content:
# session_312 — review of iter-312

## Metadata
- Prover lanes: **1** — DUAL (`Picard/TensorObjSubstrate/DualInverse.lean`). D3′ HELD (refactor → iter-313). FBC = blueprint-only setup iter (no prover).
- Build: **GREEN** (`lake env lean DualInverse.lean` exits 0; only longLine warnings).
- DualInverse.lean sorry: **unchanged** (no close, no new bare sorry, no bare-sorry revert). 4 new axiom-clean helper lemmas landed.
- Bare sorries in DualInverse.lean now at L707, L860, L920, L1051, L1199.
- Targets attempted: `sliceDualTransport.right_inv` (assigned), `sliceDualTransport.left_inv` (adjacent, restored).

## What happened
Both `sliceDualTransport` round-trips were reduced — their full 3-`inv ε` telescopes ELIMINATED — to **ONE shared, fully-specified φ/ψ-naturality residual**. Neither closed: both bottom out at the same `ModuleCat.Hom.hom'` / `AddEquiv.refl.toLinearEquiv` coercion wall (the documented `dualcoerce309` wall), which blocks the `change`/`conv` needed before `PresheafOfModules.naturality_apply` can fire.

### 4 new helper lemmas (all compile, axiom-clean, lvb + auditor confirm honest)
- `appIso_relabel_cancel` (morphism form, L254) — `(appIso W').hom ∘ X.presheaf.map(opensFunctor.op.map i) ∘ (appIso P).inv = Y.presheaf.map i`, via `Scheme.Hom.appIso_inv_naturality` + `Iso.inv_hom_id`. **Currently UNUSED** (auditor major; lvb minor) — only `_apply` is consumed.
- `ofBijective_appIso_inv_symm` (L275) — `(ofBijective (appIso W').inv).symm = (appIso W').hom`.
- `ofBijective_appIso_hom_symm` (L289) — `(ofBijective (appIso P).hom).symm = (appIso P).inv`.
- `appIso_relabel_cancel_apply` (L~310) — **the planner-requested 3-way cancellation in the goal's `RingEquiv.ofBijective ·.symm` spelling**; collapses the telescope to `Y.presheaf.map (eqToHom (op hPW))` by `subst hPW` (both relabels → `eqToHom_refl` identities, the two `appIso` swaps cancel via `inv_hom_id`). Fired by `erw`.

### right_inv — PARTIAL (telescope collapsed)
The 3 `inv ε` (already `εInv_apply`-reduced iter-311 to `(appIso W').inv⁻¹ ∘ εrel⁻¹ ∘ (appIso P).hom⁻¹`, swaps NON-adjacent) collapsed via `erw [appIso_relabel_cancel_apply f hPW]` (`hPW:P=W'` by `f.preimage_image_eq`). Residual = `Y.presheaf.map(eqToHom)(ψ.app A (collapse (M.val.map(eqToHom) z))) = ψ.app W z`. `simp only [ModuleCat.restrictScalars.map_apply, ModuleCat.hom_comp, …, LinearEquiv.apply_symm_apply]` → all args "unused" (no syntactic match through `.hom'`).

### left_inv — PARTIAL (restored + collapsed to SAME residual)
Was migration-broken to a near-bare sorry. Restored the εInv reduction; here the two `appIso` swaps are ADJACENT ⇒ closed with the EXISTING `appIso_swap_cancel` (via `erw`; plain `rw`/`simp [Over.mk_left]` fail). Reaches the identical φ.naturality crux.

### The shared crux (the one remaining sorry in each round-trip)
`Y.presheaf.map(eqToHom)((ψ.app A)(arg)) = (ψ.app W) z`. Close = pick thin-poset slice `g:W⟶A` from `P=W'`, apply `PresheafOfModules.naturality_apply ψ g z`, then two thin-poset facts: (a) `M₁.map g z = collapse(M.val.map(eqToHom) z)`; (b) `Y.presheaf.map(eqToHom) ∘ M₂.map g = id`. **Blocker is TOOLING** (the `.hom'` projection), not math.

## Subagent reports
- **lean-vs-blueprint-checker (`dual312`)** — bidirectionally faithful, **0 must-fix**. 4 helpers honest; both round-trip residual sorries genuine (real reductions, not laundered); no signature drift on `lem:slice_dual_transport[_inv]`; proof block correctly left unmarked. Minors: 4 helpers lack `\lean{}` blueprint labels (expected — planner to blueprint); `appIso_relabel_cancel` unused. Report: `.archon/task_results/lean-vs-blueprint-checker-dual312.md`.
- **lean-auditor (`dual312`)** — **2 must-fix, 4 major, 5 minor**. The iter-312 work is clean; the must-fix items are **pre-existing stale/false comments** (doc-laundering risk, not introduced this iter):
  - MUST-FIX L52 module docstring claims `homOfLocalCompat` is "CLOSED, axiom-clean" — FALSE: it carries a transitive sorry from `homLocalSection.naturality` (L1199); LSP fires `declaration uses 'sorry'` on `homOfLocalCompat` (L1354). v4.31.0 migration regression.
  - MUST-FIX L1369 inline comment "no `sorry` remains in this declaration" — same falsehood.
  - MAJOR: L39–40 module-doc sorry count stale (says 4, only 3 remain); L254 `appIso_relabel_cancel` dead code; L557/631/682/1035 `(f.appIso _).inv` NatTrans naturality silently sorry'd ×4 (follows from `Scheme.Hom.appIso_inv_naturality`); L1071/1073 `CategoryTheory.Sheaf.val` deprecated. Report: `.archon/task_results/lean-auditor-dual312.md`.

## Blueprint markers updated (manual)
None. The 4 new helpers have no blueprint entry yet (all in `archon dag-query unmatched`); the review agent does not author informal prose — listed for the planner in `recommendations.md`. No `\lean{}` renames flagged (prover used the planner-requested names). No stale `\notready` found on a now-existing decl. No `\mathlibok` candidates.

## Notes
- `sync_leanok` (iter-312, sha a679a9e8): **+6 / −70** markers across 4 chapters (Cohomology_CechHigherDirectImage, Cohomology_FlatBaseChange, Picard_GrassmannianQuot, Picard_SectionGradedRing). The large −70 reflects the FBC dead-code DELETION (plan phase) + v4.31.0 interim-sorry holes the deterministic script correctly un-marked; not laundering.
- blueprint-doctor: 14 broken `\uses`/`\cref` (2 `Picard_GlueDescent`, 12 `Picard_QuotScheme`) — pre-existing, off the active DUAL front, 0 damage to the DUAL gate chapter. No orphan chapters, no new axioms.
- DUAL trajectory: iter-311 closed `left_inv` (−1 sorry); iter-312 reduced BOTH round-trips to the shared crux but closed neither (+4 helpers, 0 net sorry). This is the early helper-churn signal — see recommendations (do NOT add more cancel helpers).
